results.title: Enliven Therapeutics (NASDAQ:ELVN) Now Covered by Analysts at Stifel Nicolaus
results.description: Analysts at Stifel Nicolaus started coverage on shares of Enliven Therapeutics (NASDAQ:ELVN – Get Free Report) in a report issued on Tuesday,Benzinga reports. The brokerage set a “buy” rating and a $60.00 price target on the stock. Stifel Nicolaus’ price objective would indicate a potential upside of 78.41% from the company’s previous close. Several other [...]

results.title: Medicare rates will rise for some in State Health Plan
results.description: (Carolina Journal) – For North Carolina's older workers and retirees in the State Health Plan, rates on the Medicare Advantage plans will increase, the Board of Trustees says.
